ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 502, NO APPEARANCES, NOT CONTESTED, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER'S MOTION SUBSTITUTING SHERRY NEWTON, AS DECEDENT'S SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST, FOR WAYNE HARTMAN, DECEASED, AND TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Continued To Dec-17-26 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 502

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Sherry Newton As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 19, 2026, in Department 502, Line 1.

No appearances, not contested, The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner's Motion Substituting Sherry Newton, as Decedent's successor-in-interest, for Wayne Hartman, Deceased, and to file a First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court has executed Plaintiff's proposed order.

Judge: Victor M. Hwang. Clerk: Johnny Sengmany. Reporter: NOT REPORTED (502).
